introSection: Speedway was a wooden roller coaster located at Eldridge Park in Elmira, New York, USA.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: The ride was an out and back coaster. Thus, the ride is hill after hill, turns, more hills, turns, back to station.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: Three-car trains with three benches per car.

sections.title: External links
sections.content: * Offride footage of the roller coaster on YouTube

fullText:
Speedway was a wooden roller coaster located at Eldridge Park in Elmira, New York, USA.

The ride was an out and back coaster. Thus, the ride is hill after hill, turns, more hills, turns, back to station.

Three-car trains with three benches per car.


 * Offride footage of the roller coaster on YouTube
